params.name: Gravitational Lensing
params.description:
On Dec 16, 1911 AD, Einstein proposed the hypothesis about the gravitational lensing effect.
The gravitational lensing effect is a phenomenon predicted by Einstein's theory of general relativity. Due to the distortion of space-time near massive celestial bodies, light passing near these bodies is bent. If there is a massive body along the line of sight from the observer to the light source, the observer will see one or more images formed due to the bending of light, which is known as the grav …
